ValidationRule.description: The Invoice is in status "Sent to Abacus" and can therefore only be changed by Finance.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsFinanceManager__c = false, ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Sent"), DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate) <= today(), OR( ISCHANGED(InvoiceReceiver__c), ISCHANGED(BillingNameAddition__c), ISCHANGED(InvoiceDate__c), ISCHANGED(InvoiceSentDate__c), ISCHANGED(FinanceDate__c), ISCHANGED(PeriodFrom__c), ISCHANGED(PeriodUntil__c), ISCHANGED(CustomerOrderNr__c), ISCHANGED(CustomerReference__c), ISCHANGED(TermsOfPayment__c), ISCHANGED(InvoiceContact__c), ISCHANGED(BillingModel__c), ISCHANGED(InvoiceTitle__c), ISCHANGED(InvoiceDescription__c), ISCHANGED(ShowProjectInvoiceDescription__c), ISCHANGED(OpportunityQuoteNr__c), ISCHANGED(VATPercent__c), ISCHANGED(ContractPartner__c), ISCHANGED(InvoiceDocumentNr__c), ISCHANGED(InvoiceTotalAmountGross__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Invoice is in status "Sent to Abacus" and can only be changed by Finance. (IN022)
